revision.text:
{{Redirect|山王塚古墳|下野市の古墳|山王塚古墳 (下野市)}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|山王塚古墳}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =南大塚
古墳群| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|所在地（山王塚古墳地点を表示）}}}} '''南大塚古墳群'''（みなみおおつかこふんぐん）は、[[埼玉県]][[川越市]]にある[[古墳群]]。現在、[[関越自動車道]]が古墳群を貫いている。現存する古墳は山王塚古墳など13基で、1969年（昭和44年）に[[埼玉県選定重要遺跡]]に選定された{{Sfn|埼玉県教育局市町村支援部文化資源課|2022|pp=116–122}}。このうち'''山王塚古墳'''（さんのうづかこふん）が2023年（令和5年）3月20日に国の[[史跡]]に指定されている{{Cite web|和書|author=文化財保護課史跡担当|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=山王塚古墳の国史跡指定について|work=川越市|date=2023-03-20|accessdate=2023-04-25}}令和5年（2023年）3月20日文部科学省告示第14号。。 == 主な古墳 == === 山王塚古墳 === 南大塚古墳群中最も東に位置する。[[上円下方墳]]という特異な形態をしており、1958年（昭和33年）に川越市指定史跡に指定された。下方部の一辺63メートル、高さ1メートル、上円部直径47メートル、高さ3.5メートル。1991年（平成3年）と1996年（平成8年）に周溝の[[発掘調査]]が行われている。 === 山王塚西古墳 === 直径32メートルほどの[[円墳]]であったが、1916年（大正5年）の開墾で破壊された。主体部は、奥壁および側壁は破壊されているが、南に開口する全長11.55メートルの横穴式石室である。副葬品は、大刀2、柄頭1、刀装具片1、留金具片1、鉄鏃片22、刀子1、鉇1、鍬刃先片1、瑪瑙製勾玉6、水晶製勾玉2、漆塗木製練玉1、ガラス製小玉3、ガラス製臼玉14、水晶製切小玉2、金銅製環9、金銅製環片5が出土している。これらの遺物は一括して2010年（平成22年）2月24日に市指定[[有形文化財]]に指定された。 === 菅原神社東古墳 === [[ファイル:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|菅原神社東古墳の上に鎮座する菅原神社社殿]] 直径20メートルほどの円墳。墳丘の上に菅原神社の社殿が建立され、墳丘の変形が見られる{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/ |title=南大塚 菅原神社・菅原神社東古墳 |publisher=株式会社 十吉（カワゴエール） |page= |accessdate=2017-09-14 }}。 == 文化財 == ===国指定=== * 史跡 ** 山王塚古墳 - 1958年（昭和33年）3月6日、川越市指定史跡→2023年（令和5年）3月20日、国の史跡に指定。 === 川越市指定 === * 有形文化財 ** 山王塚西古墳出土品 - 2010年（平成22年）2月24日指定。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用した文献）}} {{参照方法|date=2017年9月|section=1}} * 塩野博 『埼玉の古墳　北足立・入間』pp458-472、さきたま出版会、2004年 *{{Cite book|和書|author=埼玉県教育局市町村支援部文化資源課|title=埼玉県文化財目録（令和4年3月現在）|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=[[埼玉県教育委員会]]|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == 関連文献 == {{small|（記事執筆に使用していない関連文献）}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2019|chapter=|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 山王塚古墳 総括報告書]|publisher=川越市教育委員会|isbn=|page=|ref=}} - リンクは奈良文化財研究所「全国遺跡報告総覧」。 == 関連項目 == * [[埼玉県指定文化財一覧]] * [[南大塚 (川越市)]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html 南大塚古墳群発掘調査現地説明会当日配布資料（概略版）] - 川越市公式サイト * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html 南大塚古墳群（第２次調査）] - 川越市公式サイト * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html 川越市/有形文化財(書跡典籍古文書・考古資料・歴史資料)] - 川越市 {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{考古学}} {{日本の文化財}} {{リダイレクトの所属カテゴリ |redirect1=山王塚古墳 |1-1=埼玉県の古墳 |1-2=川越市の歴史 |1-3=上円下方墳 |1-4=埼玉県にある国指定の史跡 }} {{デフォルトソート:みなみおおつかこふんくん}} [[Category:埼玉県の古墳]] [[Category:川越市の歴史]] [[Category:古墳群]] [[Category:埼玉県内の市町村指定有形文化財]] [[Category:埼玉県選定重要遺跡]]

revision.text:
{{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|ja|川越市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. The cluster is bisected by the {{ill|Kan-etsu Expressway|ja|関越自動車道}}. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{Archaeology}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Municipal Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:refreshing redirects]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[sn:Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[en:Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster]] {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.text:
{{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|ja|川越市|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft}}. The cluster is bisected by the {{ill|Kan-etsu Expressway|ja|関越自動車道|qq=draft}}. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - revision.text:
{{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|ja|川越市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawagoe, Saitama|qq=}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefecture|qq=}}. The cluster is bisected by the {{ill|Kan-etsu Expressway|ja|関越自動車道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan-etsu Expressway|qq=}}. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|qq=}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|qq=}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - revision.comment: Bot: update category → History of Kawagoe, Saitama
revision.text:
{{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|qq=}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|qq=}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Municipal Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[sn:Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[en:Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:埼玉県内の市町村指定有形文化財]] [[Category:埼玉県選定重要遺跡]] [[Category:History of Kawagoe, Saitama]]

revision.text:
{{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|qq=}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - revision.comment: Merge [[Category:埼玉県内のMunicipal designated tangible cultural property]] into [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] via bot
revision.text:
{{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|qq=}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[sn:Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:埼玉県選定重要遺跡]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}}

{{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|qid=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17213764]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|qq=|1=Important Cultural Property|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[sn:Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

[[commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|qid=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17213764]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|qq=|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}}

These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - [[sn:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|WD=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17213764]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) -
