revision.text:
[[sn:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|WD=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17213764]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] }} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q17213764}}

These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - [[commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[sn:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|WD=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17213764]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - [[commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[sn:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|WD=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17213764]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:11, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in [[:en:Kawagoe, Saitama|Kawagoe, Saitama]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. The cluster is bisected by the [[:en:Kan-etsu Expressway|Kan-etsu Expressway]]. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages with conflicting qids]]

In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - revision.text:
[[co:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[co:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[sn:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|WD=Q319740}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. The cluster is bisected by the {{ill|Kan-etsu Expressway|en|Kan-etsu Expressway|WD=Q1059893|lt=Kan-etsu Expressway}}. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[co:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[co:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] [[sn:commons:Category:Minami Otsuka Kofun Group]][[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Kawagoe|WD=Q319740|1=Kawagoe, Saitama}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.89983333333333|N|139.46180555555554|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} {{Redirect|Sannozuka Kofun|Kofun in Shimotsuke City|{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|lt=Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}}} [[File:Sannozuka Kofun, funkyu and torii.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Sannozuka Kofun}}]] {{Location map|Japan Saitama Prefecture|relief=1| lat_deg = 35| lat_min = 53| lat_sec = 59.4| lon_deg = 139| lon_min = 27| lon_sec = 42.5| label =Minami-Otsuka
Kofun Cluster| position = bottom| mark = Red pog.svg| marksize = 10| width = 250| caption={{Center|Location (showing the Sannozuka Kofun)}}}} '''Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster''' (南大塚古墳群) is a cluster of kofun located in {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|WD=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe, Saitama|1=Kawagoe, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. The cluster is bisected by the {{ill|Kan-etsu Expressway|en|Kan-etsu Expressway|WD=Q1059893|lt=Kan-etsu Expressway|1=Kan-etsu Expressway}}. Thirteen kofun, including the {{ill|Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Minami-Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster|lt=Sannozuka Kofun|ja|山王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 南大塚古墳群}}, remain. In 1969 (Shōwa 44), the site was designated an {{ill|Important Cultural Property|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117830994}} by Saitama Prefecture. Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

Among them, the Sannozuka Kofun was designated a [[National Historic Site of Japan]] on March 20, 2023.{{Sfn|Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|2022|pp=116–122}}{{Cite web|author=Kawagoe City Cultural Property Protection Division|url=https://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/smph/kosodatekyoiku/kyoikuinkai/rekishi/oshirase/bunkazai041220.html|title=Sannozuka Kofun designated a National Historic Site|work=Kawagoe City|date=2023-03-20}} == Main Kofun == === Sannozuka Kofun === Located at the easternmost part of the cluster, the Sannozuka Kofun is a unique {{ill|Jōen-kahō-fun|ja|上円下方墳|1=Joenkahofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōen-kahō-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Joenkahofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It was designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33). The lower square section measures 63 meters per side and 1 meter in height, while the upper circular section has a diameter of 47 meters and a height of 3.5 meters. Excavations of the surrounding moat were conducted in 1991 (Heisei 3) and 1996 (Heisei 8). === Sannozuka West Kofun === This was a circular kofun approximately 32 meters in diameter, but it was destroyed during land reclamation in 1916 (Taishō 5). The burial chamber is a horizontally oriented stone chamber opening to the south, with a total length of 11.55 meters. Artifacts include: * Weapons: Two swords, one pommel, various fittings, and fragments of iron arrowheads (22). * Ornaments: Six agate magatama, two crystal magatama, one lacquered wooden bead, three small glass beads, 14 cylindrical glass beads, two cut crystal beads, nine gilt bronze rings, and five gilt bronze ring fragments. These items were designated Kawagoe City Tangible Cultural Properties on February 24, 2010 (Heisei 22). === Sugawara Shrine East Kofun === [[File:Kawagoe_Sugawara_Zinzya_Haiden_1.jpg|thumb|Sugawara Shrine's hall, located atop Sugawara Shrine East Kofun]] A circular kofun with a diameter of approximately 20 meters. The Sugawara Shrine hall was built atop the mound, leading to its deformation.{{Cite web|url=http://www.kawagoe-yell.com/sightseeing/look/minamiotuka-sugawara/|title=Minami-Otsuka Sugawara Shrine and East Kofun|publisher=Jukichi Co.|accessdate=2017-09-14}} == Cultural Properties == === National Designation === * Historic Site ''' Sannozuka Kofun: Designated a Kawagoe City Historic Site on March 6, 1958, and elevated to a National Historic Site on March 20, 2023. === Kawagoe City Designation === * Tangible Cultural Properties ''' Artifacts from Sannozuka West Kofun: Designated February 24, 2010. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == {{small|Sources used in article preparation}} * Shiono Hiroshi, ''Kofun of Saitama: Kitaadachi and Iruma,'' pp. 458–472, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. *{{Cite book|author=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|title=Saitama Prefecture Cultural Property Catalog (as of March 2022)|url=https://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/documents/27121/saitamaken_bunkazai_r4.pdf|publisher=Saitama Prefecture Board of Education|year=2022|date=2022-03-22|ref=harv}} == Further Reading == {{small|References not directly used in article preparation}} * {{Cite book|title=[https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/68464 Sannozuka Kofun Comprehensive Report]|publisher=Kawagoe City Board of Education|year=2019|ref=}} - Link to National Research Institute for Cultural Properties' database. == See Also == * [[List of Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] * [[Minami-Otsuka (Kawagoe)]] == External Links == * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/hakkustsuchosa/kako_chosakekka/thaifushiryo.html Overview of the Minami-Otsuka Kofun Excavation - Kawagoe City official website] * [https://web.archive.org/web/20140624072608/http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/www/contents/1104829365416/index.html Minami-Otsuka Kofun Cluster (Second Excavation) - Kawagoe City official website] * [http://www.city.kawagoe.saitama.jp/kurashi/bunkakyoyo/bunkazai/shiteibunkazai/koko_rekishishiryo.html Kawagoe City / Tangible Cultural Properties (Archaeological and Historical Materials)] - Kawagoe City {{Coord|35|53|59.4|N|139|27|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-11|display=title}} {{japanese-history-stub}} {{Japanese Cultural Properties}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|南大塚古墳群|version=100177659|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:南大塚古墳群]] {{Commons category|Minami Otsuka Kofun Group}} {{wikidata link|Q17213764}} [[Category:Designated Archaeological Sites in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Joenkahofun]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
